name: Security Scan

# Trigger on every push
on: [push]

jobs:
  scan-secrets:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
        
      - name: Scan for secrets using TruffleHog
        uses: trufflesecurity/trufflehog@main
        with:
          extra_args: --only-verified
